description: Freesound is an online collaborative database of sound recordings and audio clips. It lets users search, preview, download, and contribute sounds, packs, and related metadata.
summary: Freesound.org exposes one developer integration surface: the Freesound API v2 HTTP API, documented on freesound.org with a known OpenAPI spec on APIs.guru; it supports token-based API key auth for general access and OAuth2 bearer tokens for user-authorized/write operations.
